summary: Verified all 3 bug fixes: 1) Create User button works and opens wizard with 8 role cards, 2) All 6 Quick Actions buttons in School Dashboard work correctly, 3) Teachers page renamed to 'إدارة المستخدمين والفصول' with Add Student button. All features working as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs have been fixed and verified: 1) CreateUserWizard tempPassword generation fixed (now generates at step 3->4 transition), 2) Quick Actions buttons in SchoolDashboardContent fixed (action IDs now use hyphens), 3) TeachersPage renamed and AddStudentWizard added with correct props (onOpenChange instead of onClose).

1_create_user_button.description: Create User button in Platform Admin Users page
verified: tempPassword generated correctly at Step 4 (12 characters)

2_quick_actions_buttons.description: Quick Actions in School Principal Dashboard

3_teachers_page_renamed.description: Teachers page renamed and Add Student button added
verified: Page title changed to 'إدارة المستخدمين والفصول'
Add Student button visible with data-testid='add-student-btn'
Add Student button opens AddStudentWizard correctly
Add Teacher button still present and working

bugs_verified_fixed.fix: tempPassword was being generated when transitioning FROM step 4 instead of TO step 4. Fixed by changing condition from step === 4 to step === 3 in nextStep function
AddStudentWizard was receiving onClose prop but expected onOpenChange. Fixed by changing prop name in SchoolDashboardContent.jsx

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Teachers page needs renaming and Add Student button
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Page title changed from 'إدارة المعلمين' to 'إدارة المستخدمين والفصول'. Added Add Student button with AddStudentWizard integration
